testcase.name: Constraint_jqa-technical-debt_CodeElementToBeRemoved

failure.message: Code elements annotated by "@com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.shared.annotation.ToBeRemovedInVersion" should have been removed in given version.

testcase.failure: Type = com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.rule.api.source.RuleSource Member = java.io.InputStream getInputStream() MajorVersion = 2 MinorVersion = 6 --- Type = com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.store.api.Store Member = com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.store.api.model.Descriptor find(java.lang.Class,java.lang.String) MajorVersion = 1 MinorVersion = 9

testcase.name: Constraint_java_TechnicalDebt

failure.message: Technical debt should be removed from code elements annotated by "@com.buschmais.jqassistant.plugin.java.annotation.TechnicalDebt".

testcase.failure: Priority = 0 Type = com.buschmais.jqassistant.plugin.java.test.set.scanner.technicaldebt.TechnicalDebtExample Member = debtField Description = technicalDebt:Field with debts Issue = 859 --- Priority = 1 Type = com.buschmais.jqassistant.plugin.java.test.set.scanner.technicaldebt.TechnicalDebtExample Member = Description = technicalDebt:Class with debts Issue = 284 --- Priority = 1 Type = com.buschmais.jqassistant.plugin.java.test.set.scanner.technicaldebt.TechnicalDebtExample Member = Description = technicalDebt:Class with defaults Issue = --- Priority = 2 Type = com.buschmais.jqassistant.plugin.java.test.set.scanner.technicaldebt.TechnicalDebtExample Member = doSomething Description = technicalDebt:Method with debts Issue = 3
